name: WLF_RECOMMENDATIONS
description: This table stores the details of the recommendations in different recommendation categores.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_SUMMARY_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the recommendation summary row.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for the recommendation.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Specifies the status for the recommendation.

columns.Name: STATUS_SCOPE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the status scope used to derive the recommendation status.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Specifies the category for the recommendation.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_RANK
columns.Comments: Specifies the order of the recommendation in a given recommendation category.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_SCORE
columns.Comments: Specifies the score for the recommendation in a given recommendation category.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies the date recommendation is effective.

columns.Name: WITHDRAWN_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies the date recommendation is withdrawn.

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the reason for withdrawing the recommendation.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the assigner of the recommendation.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the persona used to create the recommendation.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the attribution type for the assigner of the recommendation.

columns.Name: STATUS_CHANGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the type of status change for the recommendation.

columns.Name: STATUS_CHANGE_COMMENT
columns.Comments: Comments to be captured during the status change.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the Relation Id of the recommendation profile.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the recommendation profile id

columns.Name: ESS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Represents ESS job id that created or modified the recommendation.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Represnets the comments for recoomendation.
